description: Two defective C++ TUs; only src/main.cpp is in compile_commands.json. Guards: the finding references the analyzed TU (QD-10612), and the out-of-DB third_party/foo.cpp yields zero findings (QD-9251).

expectations.reason: GUESS — pin exact ruleId from the control-run SARIF. The in-DB TU must produce a finding that references src/main.cpp (QD-10612).

third_party/foo.cpp is absent from compile_commands.json, so it must NOT be analyzed: zero findings under third_party/ (QD-9251). NO rule selector (neither ruleId nor ruleIdPattern) — scope is the only invariant, so a finding with ANY ruleId (or a null ruleId) under third_party/ counts and breaks the guard.
